accrualRate.label: Accrual rate
accrualRate.perHourWorked: {{accrualRate}} hour(s) for every {{accrualRateUnit}} hour(s) worked, including overtime
accrualRate.perHourWorkedNoOvertime: {{accrualRate}} hour(s) for every {{accrualRateUnit}} hour(s) worked, excluding overtime
accrualRate.perHourPaid: {{accrualRate}} hour(s) for every {{accrualRateUnit}} hour(s) including overtime and all paid hours
accrualRate.perHourPaidNoOvertime: {{accrualRate}} hour(s) for every {{accrualRateUnit}} hour(s) worked and all paid hours, excluding overtime

paidOutOnTermination.label: Paid out on termination
paidOutOnTermination.yes: Yes, remaining time off balances for this policy are paid out when an employee is dismissed.
paidOutOnTermination.no: No, remaining time off balances for this policy are not paid out when an employee is dismissed.

addEmployeeModal.title: Add employee to this policy
addEmployeeModal.description: Select the employees to add to this policy. Employees not shown are either already included or not eligible.

removeEmployeeModal.title: Remove {{name}} from policy?
removeEmployeeModal.alert: When you remove an employee from a policy, any existing balance is removed.

removeEmployeesModal.title: Remove {{count}} employee(s) from policy?
removeEmployeesModal.alert: When you remove an employee from a policy, any existing balance is removed.

flash.employeeRemoved: {{name}} has been removed from the policy.
flash.employeesRemoved_one: {{count}} employee has been removed from the policy.
flash.employeesRemoved_other: {{count}} employees have been removed from the policy.
flash.employeesAdded_one: {{count}} employee has been added to this policy.
flash.employeesAdded_other: {{count}} employees have been added to this policy.
flash.balanceUpdated: {{name}}'s time off balance has been updated.
